questions.question: Who led the Indian National Movement after 1915?
questions.answer: Mahatma Gandhi.

questions.question: In which year did Mahatma Gandhi return to India from South Africa?
What was the Rowlatt Act?
questions.answer: A law that allowed detention without trial.

questions.question: In which year did the Jallianwala Bagh massacre take place?
Who ordered the Jallianwala Bagh firing?
questions.answer: General Dyer.

questions.question: What was the Non-Cooperation Movement?
questions.answer: A movement to refuse cooperation with British rule.

questions.question: In which year did the Non-Cooperation Movement begin?
What is meant by Swaraj?
questions.answer: Self-rule.

questions.question: Why was the Non-Cooperation Movement withdrawn?
questions.answer: Due to the Chauri Chaura incident.

questions.question: In which year did the Civil Disobedience Movement start?
What was the Salt March?
questions.answer: A protest against the British salt tax.

questions.question: From where did Gandhi start the Dandi March?
questions.answer: Sabarmati Ashram.

questions.question: What was the Khilafat Movement related to?
questions.answer: Protection of the Ottoman Caliph.

questions.question: Which organization demanded separate electorates for Muslims?
questions.answer: The Muslim League.

questions.question: What was the main aim of the Civil Disobedience Movement?
questions.answer: Complete independence (Purna Swaraj).

questions.question: Which incident led to the withdrawal of the Non-Cooperation Movement?
questions.answer: The Chauri Chaura incident.

questions.question: What does boycott mean?
questions.answer: Refusal to use or buy goods.

questions.question: In which session was Purna Swaraj declared?
questions.answer: Lahore Session of 1929.

questions.question: Who was the Viceroy during the Civil Disobedience Movement?
questions.answer: Lord Irwin.

questions.question: What was the Simon Commission?
questions.answer: A British commission to review constitutional reforms in India.

questions.question: Why was the Simon Commission opposed?
questions.answer: Because it had no Indian members.

questions.question: What was the Gandhi-Irwin Pact?
questions.answer: An agreement between Gandhi and Lord Irwin in 1931.

questions.question: What was the Quit India Movement?
questions.answer: A mass movement demanding British leave India.

questions.question: In which year was the Quit India Movement launched?
What was the main objective of Indian nationalists?
questions.answer: To achieve independence from British rule.
